violations.text: Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025

Whipped cream and ham were observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025
Refrigerator #1 located in the kitchen area was not in good repair, ambient observed at 45F. PIC took unit out of service at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigeration shelving have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025
The floors in the ware washing area have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025
Ice machine located in the ware-washing area was not in good repair. Original ice shield screws are missing. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024
